chapter_title.ar: باب الْحَدِّ الَّذِي يُدْخَلُ بِالْمَرْأَةِ فِيهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 61 – The (age) limit which the woman can be copulated with

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/137)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/137)

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ

text: لَا يُدْخَلُ بِالْجَارِيَةِ حَتَّى يَأْتِيَ لَهَا تِسْعُ سِنِينَ أَوْ عَشْرُ سِنِينَ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu Nasr, from Abdul Kareem Bin Amro, from Abu Baseer,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘One cannot copulate with the girl until there come to her nine years or ten years’.
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn abu Nasr from ‘Abd al-Karim ibn ‘Amr from abu Basir who has said the following: (...Consult Fatwah about this Hadith)
